name: trigger_workflow
description: Trigger a notification workflow for one or more recipients. Workflows orchestrate multi-channel notifications with batching, delays, and conditions across push, email, SMS, Slack, and in-app channels.

parameters.name: recipients
parameters.description: Array of user IDs or object references to notify.

parameters.name: actor
parameters.description: The user ID who triggered the action.

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Data payload available in notification templates.
